## 描述 / Description

**中文**: 请描述这个 PR 的主要改动。

**English**: Please describe the main changes of this PR.

Fixes # (issue)

## 改动类型 / Type of Change

- [ ] Bug 修复 (Bug fix)
- [ ] 新功能 (New feature)
- [ ] 破坏性变更 (Breaking change)
- [ ] 文档更新 (Documentation update)
- [ ] 代码重构 (Refactoring)
- [ ] 性能优化 (Performance improvement)
- [ ] 测试相关 (Testing)

## 测试 / Testing

**中文**: 描述你如何测试这些改动。

**English**: Describe how you tested these changes.

- [ ] 单元测试通过 / Unit tests pass
- [ ] E2E 测试通过 / E2E tests pass
- [ ] 手动测试通过 / Manual testing done

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 代码符合项目规范 / Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] 自我审查完成 / Self-review completed
- [ ] 代码注释清晰 / Code is well-commented
- [ ] 文档已更新 / Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] 测试已添加或更新 / Tests added or updated (if needed)
- [ ] 所有测试通过 / All tests pass

## 截图 / Screenshots

（如适用，添加截图展示改动效果）

(If applicable, add screenshots to show the changes)

## 附加说明 / Additional Notes

任何审查者需要知道的额外信息。

Any additional information that reviewers should know.
